# RFC 0010: Late disposition

The author descoped the proposal by appending the disposition sentence instead
of deleting the requirement blocks it contradicts.

## Requirements

### Requirement: Abandoned promise
ID: abandoned-promise
Provenance: code

The system SHALL do the thing that is no longer in scope.

#### Scenario: Abandoned
- **WHEN** the change is applied
- **THEN** the thing happens

No new behavioral requirements: the promise above was descoped.
